Question: Procurement lead times
Response: All of the above, CBP holds, FCC holds, impossible bureaucratic processes, many companies have build businesses around navigating this. Whether we like it or not, everything is made outside the US, China being the largest. It’s not just lower cost but it’s also significantly faster. Today US companies that manufacture electrical infrastructure cannot compete with the speed of Chinese manufacturing. Tariffs on Chinese imports are not moving production to the US or getting China to pay more the prices are pushed to the American consumers. US labor and automation are too expensive and too slow to compete. It should never be more cost or time efficient to put transformers or substations on a boat and ship to the US. 30+ days transit by boat + fuel costs should push their prices above US but it doesn’t and it’s not even close.
